title: DiscordPresence
description: Gives you full control over your Discord Rich Presence from inside Minecraft. Set custom text, pick your own images, create per-server profiles, and let the mod automatically switch between them based on what you're doing.
body:
## Show your Minecraft activity on Discord — exactly the way you want

**DiscordPresence** gives you full control over your Discord Rich Presence directly from Minecraft.  
Customize text, choose your own images, create per-server profiles, and let the mod automatically switch between them based on what you're doing.

![DiscordRPC Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3aa2d9e397d4c418f07128c25b246d1d05a30c8_0.webp)

---

## Features

### Per-Server Profiles
Create unique profiles tied to specific server IPs.  
Join one server and get a unique look - join another server and get a completely different one

### 26 Live Variables
Display real in-game data directly in your status: 
{player} {world} {server} {server_ip} {dimension} {biome} {health} {hunger} {armor} {gamemode} {difficulty} {x} {y} {z} {xp_level} {fps} {ping} {weather} {time} {day} {held_item} {version} {online} {max_players} {modcount}

![Live Variable Photo Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1abfc3b4f37dfdecad2bc0a52b557272046c785e.png)

### Interactive In-Game Editor
Click directly on the Discord preview card to edit any section:
- Large icon  
- Small icon  
- Details text  
- State text  
- Buttons  

Everything is editable just by clicking what you want to change.

### Save Your Own Presets
Create a setup you like, name it, and save it.  
Load it anytime on any profile or tab.

### Clickable Buttons
Add up to **2 clickable buttons** to your presence — perfect for:
- Twitch streams  
- Server IPs  
- Links  

*Note: Buttons are visible to others, but not to yourself (Discord limitation).*
